metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Marius - SDD and more

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Specification-Driven Development: governance, workflow commands, and enforcement hooks for Claude Code projects

plugins.name: codescout-companion
plugins.description: Companion for codescout MCP server: injects tool guidance + GitHub context into main and subagents, blocks Read/Grep/Glob/Bash/Edit/Write on source files with structured alternatives, worktree state machine (symlinks, write-guard, activate_project), auto-reindex + drift warnings

plugins.name: claude-statusline
plugins.description: Rich, color-coded terminal status line showing model, context %, rate limits, git info, cost, and more.

plugins.name: buddy
plugins.description: A Himalayan-aesthetic bodhisattva companion for Claude Code, with 9 specialist masters on demand. Standalone or composable with claude-statusline.
